allow: PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List; Write-Host "---PORTS---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object {$_.LocalPort -in 3000,3100} | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess)
Bash(nohup env ALLOW_TEST_HOOKS=1 npx next dev -p 3100)
